---
event: sessionStart
title: Session start bootstrap
---

Read `.plan/rules.md` and `.plan/development-workflow.md` before doing any
work. Then inspect `.plan/session.db` for active and ready todos, and read the
nearest local planning markdown for the target area.

Available tools in this session:

- `ask_user`
- `bash`
- `create`
- `edit`
- `glob`
- `grep`
- `powershell`
- `task`
- `view`
- `web_fetch`
